description:
The ~400-line block at the top of `compile()` that calls `builder.symbol(...)` and `jmod.declare_function(...)` for every FFI fn becomes a single `declare_runtime_symbols<M: cranelift_module::Module>(module: &mut M) -> RuntimeIds`. Generic on Module so the same call works for JITModule today and ObjectModule for AOT later.

## Acceptance

- cargo test green.
- compile()'s top shrinks dramatically.
- A new RuntimeIds struct holds the FuncIds for every FFI fn, threaded into compile_fn.
title: Extract runtime symbol declarations into declare_runtime_symbols()
